# TW Market Data

> 台股資料 API，為系統、量化研究與 AI agent workflow 而設計。

## Documentation
- Quick Start: /docs/quick-start
- API Model: /docs/openapi-spec
- Data Provenance: /docs/data-provenance
- Market Coverage: /docs/market-coverage
- Tools / MCP: /docs/tools-mcp
- OpenAPI Spec: /docs/openapi-spec

## Core API Groups
- Market Prices
- Financials and Growth
- Capital Flow
- Company and Events
- Classification
- Strategy and Quant
- Query Tools

## Available-now boundary
TW Market Data uses controlled rollout. Available public datasets focus on TWSE / TPEx daily prices, MOPS fundamentals, valuation, technical indicators, institutional flow, margin/short data, company events, classification, screener, search, and query APIs.

## Contact
avenra.platform@gmail.com
